name.text: Finding area of heptagon given side length and apothem

questiontext.text:
A school garden is in the shape of a regular heptagon. The side length is {#s#} m and the apothem (the distance from the center to the midpoint of a side) is {#a#} m.

[[jsxgraph width="400px" height="400px"]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, { boundingbox: [-8, 8, 8, -8], axis: false, showNavigation: false, showCopyright: false }); var n = 7; var R = 5; /* Create Vertices */ var points = []; for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) { var angle = (2 * Math.PI * i / n) + (Math.PI / 2); points.push(board.create('point', [R * Math.cos(angle), R * Math.sin(angle)], {visible: false})); } /* Create Polygon */ board.create('polygon', points, { withLines: true, fillColor: '#dfefff', borders: {strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: '#0072b2'} }); var O = board.create('point', [0, 0], {visible: false}); /* 1. Apothem Label (Aligned to the dashed line) */ var M_apo = board.create('midpoint', [points[0], points[1]], {visible: false}); board.create('segment', [O, M_apo], {dash: 2, strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: '#0072b2'}); board.create('text', [ (O.X() + M_apo.X()) / 2, (O.Y() + M_apo.Y()) / 2 + 0.3, "{#a#} m" ], { fontSize: 14, anchorX: 'middle', rotate: function() { var ang = Math.atan2(M_apo.Y() - O.Y(), M_apo.X() - O.X()) * 180 / Math.PI; return (ang > 90 || ang < -90) ? ang + 180 : ang; } }); /* 2. Side Length Label (Aligned to the boundary) */ var p1 = points[1]; var p2 = points[2]; var M_side = board.create('midpoint', [p1, p2], {visible: false}); board.create('text', [ M_side.X() - 0.5, M_side.Y() + 0.5, "{#s#} m" ], { fontSize: 14, anchorX: 'middle', rotate: function() { var ang = Math.atan2(p2.Y() - p1.Y(), p2.X() - p1.X()) * 180 / Math.PI; return (ang > 90 || ang < -90) ? ang + 180 : ang; } }); [[/jsxgraph]]

Calculate the area of the heptagon garden.

Area = [[input:ans1]] m2 [[validation:ans1]][[feedback:prt1]]

(Leave your answer to 2 decimal places)

generalfeedback.text:
Worked Solution

The area \(A\) of a regular polygon with \(n\) sides, side length \(s\), and apothem \(a\) is given by the formula:

\[ A = \frac{n}{2} \times s \times a \]

For a heptagon (\(n = 7\)):

\[ A = \frac{7}{2} \times s \times a \] \(\begin{align} \text{A} &= \frac{7}{2} \times {@s@} \times {@a@} \\ \text{A} &= \frac{7}{2} \times {@ta_1@} \\ \text{A} &= {@ta@} \text{ m}^2 \end{align}\)

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.
